title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on democracy and civic engagement.

questions.question: Do you think democracy is under threat in many parts of the world today? What factors are contributing to this?
How effective do you think social media is as a tool for political activism and bringing about social change?

script.text: Do you think democracy is under threat in many parts of the world today? What factors are contributing to this?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
